title: Complete the form instructions
instruction: Read the instructions from a doctor's registration form. Choose the correct word for each gap.
passage: Please complete this form in ___ letters. Write your ___ name first, then your surname. Your ___ of birth should be written as DD/MM/YYYY. For example, 5th March 1985 is written as ___. Please include your full ___, including the postcode. Your ___ number should include the area code.
